text.tspan: Law of reflection emerging from wave propagation
A Plane wave (0) hits a small mirror (1).
Small mirror (1) creates a bright spot in the center of larger mirror (2).
Diffraction effects occour, but are small because the wavelength is tiny.
1% power is lost. It lands outside the next mirror due to diffraction.
1: Small Mirror (cutting out a portion of a plane wave)
